text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Tokai Teio returns to the waiting
room. However, she doesn't seem her usual self.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I have fun racing, and I'm super happy when I win
and get praised...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I just can't stop sighing. What's wrong with
me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's likely due to too many races back-to-back. I
should reconsider her race schedule.
